sub_fields.label: Background Image
sub_fields.name: background_image
sub_fields.instructions: Recommended: 1920×800px.

sub_fields.label: Sub Header
sub_fields.name: sub_header
sub_fields.instructions: Small label above the heading.

sub_fields.label: Label
sub_fields.name: label
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "EVENTS", "NEWS"

sub_fields.label: Image
sub_fields.name: image
sub_fields.instructions: Displayed to the right of the text.

sub_fields.label: Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Shown when the accordion is expanded.

sub_fields.label: Footer Description
sub_fields.name: description
sub_fields.instructions: Optional note below the accordion items.

sub_fields.label: Background Image
sub_fields.name: background_image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional texture overlaid at 12% opacity over the gradient.

sub_fields.label: Big Stat Text
sub_fields.name: big_stat_text
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "$1.89 TOTAL ECONOMIC IMPACT"

sub_fields.label: Header
sub_fields.name: header
sub_fields.default_value: OUR TEAM IS HERE TO HELP

sub_fields.label: Background Image
sub_fields.name: background_image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional full-bleed bg. Gradient overlays it.

sub_fields.label: Overlay / Watermark Image
sub_fields.name: overlay_image
sub_fields.instructions: Decorative image (e.g. PA state shape) shown at low opacity.

sub_fields.label: Photo
sub_fields.name: photo
sub_fields.instructions: Square headshot, min 400×400px.

sub_fields.label: Title / Credentials
sub_fields.name: title
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "Ed.D.", "MPAP"

sub_fields.label: Role
sub_fields.name: role
sub_fields.instructions: Job title (e.g. "Executive Director").

sub_fields.label: Sub Header
sub_fields.name: sub_header
sub_fields.instructions: Small label above heading, e.g. "WHO WE ARE".

sub_fields.label: Info Boxes
sub_fields.name: info_boxes
sub_fields.instructions: Colored boxes on the right (e.g. Federal Level, State Level).

sub_fields.label: Sub Header
sub_fields.name: sub_header
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "LEADERSHIP"

sub_fields.label: Sub Header
sub_fields.name: sub_header
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "THE SYSTEM"

sub_fields.label: Accordion Items
sub_fields.name: accordion_items
sub_fields.instructions: Optional expandable items displayed below the body text.

sub_fields.label: Section Background Image
sub_fields.name: section_bg_image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Displays at 5% opacity behind the entire section.

sub_fields.label: Strategies List Background Image
sub_fields.name: list_bg_image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Displays behind the strategies list with a light-blue-to-navy gradient overlay at 5% opacity.

sub_fields.label: Background Image
sub_fields.name: background_image
sub_fields.instructions: Optional. Displays as a watermark behind the section content.

sub_fields.label: Details Sub-Heading
sub_fields.name: details_header
sub_fields.instructions: Heading shown above the key-value details list.

sub_fields.label: Program Details
sub_fields.name: details
sub_fields.instructions: Key-value pairs: When, Cost, Where, Application, etc.

sub_fields.label: Date
sub_fields.name: date
sub_fields.instructions: e.g. "October 7-8"

sub_fields.label: Content Lists
sub_fields.name: content_lists
sub_fields.instructions: Each entry becomes a section, e.g. "Fellows Can Expect:", "Who Should Apply".

sub_fields.label: Text
sub_fields.name: text
sub_fields.instructions: Bold the first words for a label: Title: Description...

sub_fields.label: Video URL
sub_fields.name: video_url
sub_fields.instructions: YouTube or Vimeo URL. Embedded automatically.

sub_fields.label: Calendar Shortcode
sub_fields.name: calendar_shortcode
sub_fields.instructions: Paste a calendar plugin shortcode here. Leave blank to use the manual list below.

sub_fields.label: Manual Events List
sub_fields.name: events_list
sub_fields.instructions: Only used if Calendar Shortcode is empty.

sub_fields.label: Quote Text
sub_fields.name: quote_text
sub_fields.instructions: The quote content (quotation marks are added automatically).

sub_fields.label: Attribution Name
sub_fields.name: quote_name
sub_fields.instructions: Name shown below the quote.

sub_fields.label: Attribution Role / Organization
sub_fields.name: quote_role
sub_fields.instructions: Optional title or organization shown under the name.
